notes: Task JSON, reports and inbox files are the durable execution control plane. WM-0083 closed M5 with reviewed alpha content framework benchmark and invariant evidence. WM-0084 recovered the future M6 entry prompt and reviewed M6 Web / Windows Product Gate DAG without starting implementation. Owner started M6; WM-0085 instantiated WM-0086 through WM-0097 from the reviewed DAG. WM-0097 closes M6 after WM-0096 records Web verdict demo-only, not cancellation, and Windows verdict ready-for-controlled-external-test as an unsigned local directory build. Current roadmap authority: M6 = Web / Windows Product Gate, M7 = Early Access / public playtest preparation, M8 = 1.0; old M6/M7/M8/M9 inferences are deprecated. Owner started M7 after WM-0097; WM-0098 created the reviewed M7 planning package and WM-0099 through WM-0110 task DAG. WM-0110 closed M7 and wrote the future M8 prompt without starting M8 implementation. Owner then started M8 with OWNER-AMENDMENT-2026-06-27-UI-I18N-PRODUCTIZATION; WM-0111 incorporated Product UI, Responsive Layout, Localization, Visual Identity, First Playability and Accessibility gates into the reviewed M8 DAG. WM-0112 through WM-0128 are done and independently reviewed; WM-0128 cleared the WM-0126 benchmark stop sign without weakening thresholds. WM-0127 closes M8 as internal 1.0 readiness evidence only. Owner then started OWNER-AMENDMENT-2026-06-28-POST-M8-UI-PLAYABILITY-REMEDIATION; WM-0129 through WM-0142 record, implement, verify, update the verdict and close the UI/playability/i18n/responsive remediation evidence. On 2026-06-29 the Owner reopened a product UX blocker: current UI remains overwhelming, does not feel like a game, does not communicate what to do, and lacks player-perceptible NPC action plus a real build/order/job loop. WM-0145 records this blocker and drafts WM-0146 through WM-0156 as a remediation DAG centered on visible NPC action, authoritative command/job flow, lamp/build playable slice, information hierarchy repair and visual evidence. WM-0145 is done; taskctl promoted WM-0146 to ready for gameplay-designer spec work, while WM-0147-WM-0156 remain proposed and unclaimed. Release-candidate audit may proceed only as an audit/gap-assessment lane if owner requests it; public release, distribution and platform verdict changes remain blocked. Owner approval remains required before Web cancellation, public release, 1.0 release, Early Access launch, store submission, signing, installer/updater distribution, telemetry, accounts, hosted services, paid services, public feedback systems, final privacy/legal/store claims or public save compatibility commitments.
